top_findings.summary: The skill description in SKILL.md requests the ability to "sync logs from production server" (implying network access and potentially authentication to production systems) and to "use `grep` or search tools" (implying system command execution). These capabilities directly contradict the security promises in README.md ("无网络访问", "无系统命令执行" – no network access, no system command execution). For a log analyzer that claims to be a "完全静态分析" (completely static analysis) tool with read-only access to local files, requesting network sync and command execution is excessive and inconsistent with its stated safety profile.
